title: The Island With No Snakes: Socotra

segments.text: This island is famous for its unique biodiversity.
Located in the Arabian Sea, off Yemen.
It's home to hundreds of endemic species.
Some plants have evolved into their own unique forms.
A paradise for botanists and nature lovers alike.
Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: 📍 Socotra Island, Yemen — Arabian Sea. An island renowned for its extraordinary plant life and lack of snakes. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
